blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 30 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 26".
